title: IES-R (Impact of Event Scale - Revised)
instruction: Below is a list of difficulties people sometimes have after stressful life events. Please read each item, and then indicate how distressing each difficulty has been for you DURING THE PAST SEVEN DAYS. Respond with 22 numbers (0–4).

questions.text: Any reminder brought back feelings about it
questions.options: 0=Not at all 1=A little bit 2=Moderately 3=Quite a bit 4=Extremely

questions.text: I had trouble staying asleep
questions.options: 0=Not at all 1=A little bit 2=Moderately 3=Quite a bit 4=Extremely

questions.text: Other things kept making me think about it
questions.options: 0=Not at all 1=A little bit 2=Moderately 3=Quite a bit 4=Extremely

questions.text: I felt irritable and angry
questions.options: 0=Not at all 1=A little bit 2=Moderately 3=Quite a bit 4=Extremely

questions.text: I avoided letting myself get upset when I thought about it or was reminded of it
questions.options: 0=Not at all 1=A little bit 2=Moderately 3=Quite a bit 4=Extremely

questions.text: I thought about it when I didn't mean to
questions.options: 0=Not at all 1=A little bit 2=Moderately 3=Quite a bit 4=Extremely

questions.text: I felt as if it hadn't happened or wasn't real
questions.options: 0=Not at all 1=A little bit 2=Moderately 3=Quite a bit 4=Extremely

questions.text: I stayed away from reminders about it
questions.options: 0=Not at all 1=A little bit 2=Moderately 3=Quite a bit 4=Extremely

questions.text: Pictures about it popped into my mind
questions.options: 0=Not at all 1=A little bit 2=Moderately 3=Quite a bit 4=Extremely

questions.text: I was jumpy and easily startled
questions.options: 0=Not at all 1=A little bit 2=Moderately 3=Quite a bit 4=Extremely

questions.text: I tried not to think about it
questions.options: 0=Not at all 1=A little bit 2=Moderately 3=Quite a bit 4=Extremely

questions.text: I was aware that I still had a lot of feelings about it, but I didn't deal with them
questions.options: 0=Not at all 1=A little bit 2=Moderately 3=Quite a bit 4=Extremely

questions.text: My feelings about it were kind of numb
questions.options: 0=Not at all 1=A little bit 2=Moderately 3=Quite a bit 4=Extremely

questions.text: I found myself acting or feeling as though I was back at that time
questions.options: 0=Not at all 1=A little bit 2=Moderately 3=Quite a bit 4=Extremely

questions.text: I had trouble falling asleep
questions.options: 0=Not at all 1=A little bit 2=Moderately 3=Quite a bit 4=Extremely

questions.text: I had waves of strong feelings about it
questions.options: 0=Not at all 1=A little bit 2=Moderately 3=Quite a bit 4=Extremely

questions.text: I tried to remove it from my memory
questions.options: 0=Not at all 1=A little bit 2=Moderately 3=Quite a bit 4=Extremely

questions.text: I had trouble concentrating
questions.options: 0=Not at all 1=A little bit 2=Moderately 3=Quite a bit 4=Extremely

questions.text: Reminders of it caused me to have physical reactions, such as sweating, trouble breathing, nausea, or a pounding heart
questions.options: 0=Not at all 1=A little bit 2=Moderately 3=Quite a bit 4=Extremely

questions.text: I had dreams about it
questions.options: 0=Not at all 1=A little bit 2=Moderately 3=Quite a bit 4=Extremely

questions.text: I felt watchful or on-guard
questions.options: 0=Not at all 1=A little bit 2=Moderately 3=Quite a bit 4=Extremely

questions.text: I tried not to talk about it
questions.options: 0=Not at all 1=A little bit 2=Moderately 3=Quite a bit 4=Extremely
